vision_report.narrative_report: The latest image shows a stable garden state. All plants maintain their posture and leaf counts from the previous three frames. The white rabbit remains inside the Pothos pot, serving as a consistent scale anchor. The Silver Guest remains densely packed, making accurate leaf counting difficult. Overall, the garden appears healthy with no significant changes observed.
